content.content: I bought an Adidas T-shirt last month. Could you find the invoice and save it to /user?

<function_thought>

Once I have the order ID, I can then retrieve the invoice corresponding to that order. Following the initialized function trajectory, I will start with viewing the order history.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[view_order_history()]</function_call>
